Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Lindsay Aronson As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Lindsay Aronson as Successor-in-Interest to, and Substituting Successor-in-Interest for, Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED. (Code Civ. Proc. section 377.31.) No opposition filed. Lindsay Aronson is substituted as successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff Russell Van Zilen Sr.

Plaintiff's request to file a First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. (Code Civ. Proc. section 473(a)(1).) The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared herein, as of the date of the granting of the motion to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SF)
